sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
def compare_frames(f1, f2):
    nodes1 = {n['id']: n for n in f1.segmentation['nodes']}
    nodes2 = {n['id']: n for n in f2.segmentation['nodes']}
    
    # Compare nodes by hash and size
    hashes1 = collections.Counter([n['hash'] for n in f1.segmentation['nodes']])
    hashes2 = collections.Counter([n['hash'] for n in f2.segmentation['nodes']])
    
    print(f"Hashes in f1: {hashes1}")
    print(f"Hashes in f2: {hashes2}")
    
    if hashes1 == hashes2:
        print("No change in object types/counts.")
    else:
        print("Change in object types/counts detected.")

import collections
compare_frames(previous_frame, current_frame)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
